## Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 bullet points.

-
-

## Why

Explain the problem, motivation, or user need behind this change.

## How to test

List the exact commands or steps a reviewer can use to validate the change.

```bash
# Example
npm run type-check
npm run lint
npm test
```

## Scope and risk

- Does this change affect public tool behavior?
- Does it change runtime validation, outputs, or MCP contracts?
- Are there any known risks, edge cases, or follow-up tasks?

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran relevant checks locally
- [ ] I updated tests when behavior changed
- [ ] I updated docs/README if public behavior changed
- [ ] I updated the changelog if the change is user-facing
- [ ] I linked related issues or explained why none apply
